messages.content: Apex Sound & Light

Apex Sound & Light is a company that specializes in providing professional audio, lighting, and production services for various events and functions. They offer a wide range of equipment and expertise to help create memorable and high-quality experiences for their clients. Whether it's a concert, conference, wedding, or any other event, Apex Sound & Light has the knowledge and resources to deliver top-notch sound and lighting solutions. They also offer services such as equipment rental, event planning, installation, and consultation. With over 30 years of experience in the industry, Apex Sound & Light is a trusted name in the event production business.

PNTA

PNTA stands for Pacific Northwest Theatre Associates. It is a company based in Seattle, Washington, that specializes in providing various production services for the entertainment industry. PNTA offers services such as event design and planning, technical production, equipment rental, set construction, lighting design, sound systems, and stage management. They work with clients in a wide range of industries, including theatre, concerts, trade shows, corporate events, and more. With their experienced team and extensive inventory, PNTA aims to deliver high-quality and innovative solutions for all types of live events.
https://www.bluemoonlights.com/

Blue Moon Lights is a company that provides lighting solutions for events and weddings. Based in Houston, Texas, they offer a wide range of lighting services and products, including string lights, uplighting, custom monograms, dance floor lighting, and more. Blue Moon Lights aims to create a beautiful and memorable ambiance for their clients' special occasions. Their team works closely with clients to understand their vision and design lighting setups that meet their specific needs and preferences. With their expertise and professional approach, Blue Moon Lights strives to enhance the overall atmosphere and aesthetics of any event.

FMAV

FMAV is a Canadian company that specializes in providing audiovisual and event technology solutions. With offices throughout major cities in Canada, including Toronto, Vancouver, Calgary, and more, FMAV offers a range of services to support various types of events, including conferences, trade shows, corporate meetings, and experiential activations.

Their services include audiovisual production, staging and scenic design, digital signage, simultaneous interpretation, live webcasting, virtual and hybrid event solutions, audience engagement technologies, and more. FMAV is known for their creative and innovative approach to event technology, helping clients create impactful and memorable experiences.

They work closely with clients to understand their goals and objectives, providing end-to-end solutions that combine technology, production, and creative expertise. With a focus on exceptional customer service and technical execution, FMAV aims to deliver immersive and engaging event experiences.

DND Expositions

DND Expositions, or DND Expo, is a company that specializes in trade show and event planning and management services. Based in the United States, they work with clients across various industries to provide a range of services, including exhibit design and construction, logistics coordination, event marketing and promotion, attendee registration, and on-site management.

DND Expositions partners with clients to understand their goals and objectives, and then helps execute their vision through effective event planning and execution. Whether it's a large-scale trade show or a smaller corporate event, DND Expositions offers comprehensive solutions to ensure a seamless and successful experience for both exhibitors and attendees.

Their services encompass all aspects of event planning, from floor plan and booth design to audiovisual equipment rental, event staffing, and coordination of promotional materials and giveaways. With their expertise in the trade show industry, DND Expositions strives to create impactful and engaging experiences that drive business outcomes for their clients.
Northwest Digital

Northwest Digital is a digital marketing agency that provides a range of services to help businesses establish and grow their online presence. Based in the Northwest region of the United States, they offer services such as web design and development, search engine optimization (SEO), social media marketing, pay-per-click (PPC) advertising, content creation, and digital strategy consulting.

Northwest Digital works closely with clients to understand their specific goals and target audience, developing customized digital strategies to effectively reach and engage potential customers. Their team of marketing professionals utilizes various tools and techniques to optimize online visibility, increase website traffic, enhance brand awareness, and generate leads and conversions.

Additionally, Northwest Digital stays up-to-date with the latest digital marketing trends and best practices, ensuring that their clients benefit from innovative and effective strategies. With their expertise and dedication to client success, Northwest Digital aims to help businesses achieve their digital marketing goals and drive growth in the competitive online landscape.
MA Lighting

MA Lighting is a leading manufacturer of professional lighting control systems for the entertainment and architectural industries. Based in Germany, MA Lighting offers a range of innovative lighting consoles and software solutions that are widely used in theaters, concert venues, TV studios, and other performance spaces around the world.

Their flagship product is the grandMA series of lighting consoles, which are known for their powerful capabilities, intuitive user interface, and flexibility for controlling complex lighting setups. The grandMA consoles provide control over a wide range of lighting fixtures, including moving lights, LED fixtures, and conventional stage lighting.

In addition to their lighting consoles, MA Lighting also offers a variety of software tools and peripherals to enhance the lighting control experience. These include MA 3D visualization software, networking devices, and protocol converters.

MA Lighting has a strong reputation for their commitment to innovation, quality, and customer support. Their products are designed to meet the demands of lighting professionals, whether it be for small events or large-scale productions.
ARRI

ARRI, also known as Arnold & Richter Cine Technik, is a German manufacturer and distributor of professional film, television, and lighting equipment. The company was founded in 1917 and has become one of the leading companies in the industry.

ARRI is best known for its high-quality cameras and camera accessories used in the film and television industry. Their ALEXA camera line has gained popularity among cinematographers for its exceptional image quality and versatility. They also offer other camera models, such as the AMIRA and ALEXA Mini, catering to different production needs.

In addition to cameras, ARRI is known for its extensive range of lighting solutions. Their lighting products include LED fixtures, Fresnel lights, tungsten units, and accessories. ARRI lighting is widely recognized for its reliability, color accuracy, and energy efficiency.

ARRI also provides post-production solutions, including color grading systems and digital cinema workflows. They have a presence in various locations worldwide and offer comprehensive customer support and training services.

With a long-standing history in the industry, ARRI continues to innovate and provide cutting-edge technology to support the creative vision of filmmakers and content creators.
Cameo

Cameo is a brand that offers a wide range of professional lighting products and solutions. They specialize in stage lighting, including fixtures such as moving heads, spotlights, wash lights, and effect lights. Cameo lighting products are designed for live events, concerts, theatrical productions, and other professional applications.

Cameo offers a variety of lighting solutions suitable for different budgets and requirements. They focus on delivering high-quality and reliable products that are known for their durability and performance. Their lighting fixtures often incorporate advanced technologies and features, such as LED technology for energy efficiency and vibrant color mixing.

In addition to lighting fixtures, Cameo also provides video and visual effects products. This includes LED screens, video panels, and pixel mapping solutions that can be incorporated into stage and entertainment setups for captivating visual displays.

Cameo is appreciated by lighting professionals and enthusiasts for offering a range of versatile and affordable options. Whether for small events or large-scale productions, Cameo strives to provide quality lighting solutions that help create immersive and impactful experiences.
Robert Juliat

Robert Juliat is a renowned manufacturer of theatrical, entertainment, and architectural lighting fixtures. Based in France, the company has a long history dating back to 1919 and is recognized for its high-quality and innovative lighting solutions.

Robert Juliat specializes in manufacturing spotlight fixtures, including followspots, profile fixtures, and Fresnel fixtures. Their followspots are widely used in theaters, concert venues, and TV studios, offering precise control of light intensity, focus, and beam shaping. The profile fixtures and Fresnel fixtures are known for their versatility and optical performance, allowing lighting designers to create stunning effects and accurately illuminate performers and stage elements.

One of the standout features of Robert Juliat fixtures is the quality and functionality of their optics. The company is known for its meticulous attention to detail and craftsmanship, resulting in exceptional light output, color rendering, and beam control.

In addition to their spotlight fixtures, Robert Juliat also offers a range of accessories and peripheral devices to enhance the versatility and functionality of their products.

With a strong presence in the global entertainment and architectural lighting markets, Robert Juliat has earned a reputation for delivering reliable, high-performance lighting fixtures that meet the needs of lighting professionals in various industries.
FALCON EYES GmbH

FALCON EYES

Falcon Eyes is a well-known brand in the photography and video lighting industry. They specialize in manufacturing a wide range of lighting equipment and accessories, including LED panels, studio strobes, continuous lights, light modifiers, and more.

Falcon Eyes provides lighting solutions for various applications, from studio photography and videography to on-location shoots. Their products are designed to deliver high-quality lighting, accurate color rendering, and versatility. They offer a range of options to suit different budgets and requirements, catering to both professionals and amateur photographers and videographers.

In addition to their lighting fixtures, Falcon Eyes also offers accessories such as softboxes, reflectors, light stands, and wireless triggers. These accessories help photographers and videographers further customize their lighting setups and achieve desired lighting effects.

Falcon Eyes products are well-regarded for their durability, performance, and value for money. They have a strong presence in the photography and videography market, offering reliable lighting solutions that help capture professional-quality images and videos.
LITECRAFT

Litecraft is a well-established brand in the lighting industry that specializes in providing stage and event lighting solutions. They offer a wide range of lighting fixtures and accessories designed for both professional and amateur use.

Litecraft's product range includes LED fixtures, moving heads, spotlights, wash lights, effect lights, and architectural lighting solutions. Their fixtures are known for their high-quality performance, energy efficiency, and versatile features, allowing creative lighting designers to achieve stunning effects for concerts, theaters, clubs, and other events.

In addition to lighting fixtures, Litecraft also offers a variety of lighting accessories, such as lighting controllers, dimmers, trusses, and rigging equipment. These accessories complement their lighting fixtures, providing a complete solution for stage and event lighting needs.

Litecraft is recognized for its commitment to quality and innovation, constantly staying up-to-date with the latest technologies and trends in the lighting industry. They aim to provide reliable and user-friendly lighting solutions that meet the demands of professionals and enthusiasts alike.

With their extensive product range and industry expertise, Litecraft has earned a strong reputation for delivering high-quality lighting fixtures and accessories that help create captivating and immersive visual experiences.

Expolite

Expolite is a well-known brand in the lighting industry that specializes in providing professional lighting solutions for stage and event applications. They offer a wide range of lighting fixtures, control systems, and accessories designed to meet the needs of both small and large-scale productions.

Expolite's product range includes LED fixtures, moving heads, spotlights, wash lights, effect lights, and architectural lighting solutions. Their fixtures are known for their high-performance, durability, and versatility, allowing lighting designers to create stunning lighting designs for concerts, theaters, clubs, and various other events.

In addition to lighting fixtures, Expolite also offers lighting control systems, including DMX controllers and software, to enhance the flexibility and creativity of lighting setups. They also provide various lighting accessories, such as clamps, trusses, and rigging equipment, to complement their fixtures and facilitate the setup and installation process.

Expolite is committed to delivering reliable and innovative lighting solutions to the professional entertainment industry. With their focus on quality and customer satisfaction, they aim to meet the demands of lighting professionals and provide exceptional lighting experiences for any type of event or production.
